title: Gas pipeline diversion, West Winch environmental determination: Public Gas Transporter Pipeline Works (EIA) Regulations 1999
body: "Secretary of State’s Environmental Determination for Environmental Impact Assessment regarding a proposed development to divert an existing section of high-pressure gas pipeline on land between West Winch and North Runcton, to accommodate the West Winch Housing Access Road development. This determination is made in accordance with Regulation 6 of The Public Gas Transporter Pipeline Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) Regulations 1999 (as amended).  Date of decision  13 May 2025  Company / location   National Gas TransmissionWarwick Technology ParkGallows HillWarwickCV34 6DA   Type of project / consent requested  Request for an Environmental Determination from the Secretary of State under Regulation 6 of the Public Gas Transporter Pipeline Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) Regulations 1999 (as amended).  Approximate output  Not applicable. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
